title: Xtra Roasted Venezuelan Trout Skewers
description: A delicious and healthy Venezuelan dish featuring roasted trout skewers with a sweet and tangy marinade, perfect for a low-fat friendly dinner option. The trout is marinated in a mixture of olive oil, lime juice, and spices, then roasted to perfection.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lime juice, garlic, cumin, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Add the trout pieces to the bowl and marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Thread the marinated trout, onion, and bell pepper onto skewers.
Place the skewers on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Roast the skewers in the preheated oven for 12-15 minutes or until the trout is cooked through.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with fresh cilantro and lime wedges.
Let the skewers rest for a few minutes before serving.
Serve with your favorite sides, such as rice, salad, or grilled vegetables.
